examples.title: Servlet Lifecycle Pseudocode
examples.code:
BEGIN
 init()
 WHILE TRUE
 service()
 END WHILE
 destroy()
END
examples.explanation: The servlet lifecycle consists of three main methods: init(), service(), and destroy(). The init() method is called once when the servlet is first loaded, the service() method is called for each client request, and the destroy() method is called once when the servlet is being taken out of service.

examples.title: Java Servlet Example
examples.explanation: This Java servlet example demonstrates how to handle HTTP GET requests and send HTML responses.

examples.title: Java Servlet Session Tracking Example
examples.description: A Java servlet example demonstrating session tracking
examples.explanation: This Java servlet example demonstrates how to track user sessions using the HttpSession interface.
